title: Sky 16x
description: a Sky themed modern PvP texture pack
body:
### **About this Texture Pack**
- This is a **Sky theme pack** mainly **blue color theme**. 
- This pack focuses on **PvP** in **most modern PvP gamemodes**.
- This pack is a **1.8 style texture pack** for **modern versions**

---
### **Video about this Texture Pack**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EgAYGCDUVho" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### **Terms of Use**
- You may make **private** edits of the pack. 
- This pack is **only for personal use**. Please **do not** create your own **download link/port or public edits without my permission.**
